2605.23219.title: PaP-NF: Probabilistic Long-Term Time Series Forecasting via Prefix-as-Prompt Reprogramming and Normalizing Flows
2605.23219.paper_summary: Time series forecasting plays a central role in many real-world applications and has been extensively studied. Most existing approaches rely on deterministic models. However, real-world environments exhibit inherently uncertain and complex future behaviors, making single-point predictions insufficient. This highlights the need for probabilistic forecasting methods that can quantify and represent uncertainty. In this work, we propose PaP-NF, a probabilistic forecasting framework that aligns continuous time series representations with a frozen large language model (LLM) using a Prefix-as-Prompt mechanism, and conditions a normalizing flow decoder on the global context extracted by the LLM. The quality of the resulting predictive distributions is evaluated using the Continuous Ranked Probability Score (CRPS), a standard metric in probabilistic forecasting. Across a variety of long-term forecasting benchmarks, PaP-NF robustly captures multi-modal uncertainty while maintaining competitive point forecasting accuracy. The official implementation is available at: https://github.com/democracy04/PaP-NF
2605.23219.paper_summary_zh: 時間序列預測在許多現實世界的應用中扮演著核心角色，並且已被廣泛研究。大多數現有的方法依賴於確定性模型。然而，現實世界的環境本質上表現出不確定和複雜的未來行為，使得單點預測不夠充分。這突顯了需要能夠量化和表示不確定性的概率預測方法。在本研究中，我們提出了PaP-NF，一個概率預測框架，通過使用Prefix-as-Prompt機制將連續時間序列表示與一個凍結的大型語言模型（LLM）對齊，並在LLM提取的全局上下文上對正規化流解碼器進行條件化。所得到的預測分佈的質量使用連續排名概率分數（CRPS）進行評估，這是概率預測中的一個標準指標。在各種長期預測基準測試中，PaP-NF穩健地捕捉多模態不確定性，同時保持競爭性的點預測準確性。官方實現可在以下網址獲得：https://github.com/democracy04/PaP-NF
2605.23219.author: Minju Kim et.al.
